hawkish_phrases: advanced economy longer-term government bond yields have risen rapidly
CPI inflation is expected to return swiftly to around the 2% target in the spring
sterling effective exchange rate has appreciated
dovish_phrases: If the outlook for inflation weakens, the Committee stands ready to take whatever additional action is necessary
The Committee does not intend to tighten monetary policy at least until there is clear evidence that significant progress is being made in eliminating spare capacity
There is judged to be a material degree of spare capacity at present
labour market slack has remained higher than implied by this measure
UK GDP fell by 2.9% in January...still leaves GDP around 10% below its 2019 Q4 level
summary: The MPC voted unanimously to maintain Bank Rate at 0.1% and continue asset purchases, with explicit forward guidance that it does not intend to tighten until spare capacity is eliminated and the 2% target is sustainably achieved, reflecting strong dovish bias despite inflation expected to return to target.
